mapper.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROWNUM AS RN ,A.* ,TO_CHAR(B.SYS_REG_DTIME,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS sysRegDtime ,TO_DATE(B.SYS_REG_DTIME,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - TO_DATE(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS sysRegDtime2 FROM(SELECT TRCK_NUM AS trckNum, USR_ID AS usrId, GOODS_NM AS goodsNm, DLV_CORP_CD AS dlvCompanyCode, MAX (DLV_STAT) AS dlvStat FROM DLV_INFO WHERE USR_ID = #{usrId} GROUP BY TRCK_NUM, USR_ID, GOODS_NM, DLV_CORP_CD ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN DLV_INFO B ON B.TRCK_NUM = A.trckNum AND B.DLV_STAT = A.dlvStat ) WHERE RN > #{offset} AND RN <= #{offset} + #{limit}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT '06' AS dlvStat,COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM (SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TRCK_NUM, MAX (DLV_STAT) AS DLV_STAT FROM DLV_INFO WHERE USR_ID = #{usrId} GROUP BY TRCK_NUM ) WHERE DLV_STAT = '06') A UNION ALL SELECT '04' AS dlvStat,COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM (SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TRCK_NUM, MAX (DLV_STAT) AS DLV_STAT FROM DLV_INFO WHERE USR_ID = #{usrId} GROUP BY TRCK_NUM) WHERE DLV_STAT < 5) A UNION ALL SELECT '05' AS dlvStat,COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM (SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TRCK_NUM, MAX (DLV_STAT) AS DLV_STAT FROM DLV_INFO WHERE USR_ID = #{usrId} GROUP BY TRCK_NUM) WHERE DLV_STAT = 5) A UNION ALL SELECT '07' AS dlvStat,COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM (SELECT DLV_STAT FROM DLV_INFO WHERE SYS_REG_DTIME < (SYSDATE-14) AND TRCK_NUM IN( SELECT TRCK_NUM FROM ( SELECT TRCK_NUM, MAX (DLV_STAT) AS DLV_STAT FROM DLV_INFO WHERE USR_ID = #{usrId} GROUP BY TRCK_NUM ) WHERE DLV_STAT <= 5 ) ) A ) PIVOT (SUM(CNT) FOR DLVSTAT IN ('04' AS dlvNotFin,'05' AS dlvNow,'06' AS dlvFin,'07' AS dlvStrange))
SELECT CD AS dlvCompanyCode, CD_NM AS dlvCompanyName FROM STD_CD WHERE GRP_CD = 'DLV001'
SELECT CD AS shopCode, CD_NM AS shopName FROM STD_CD WHERE GRP_CD = 'DLV002'

SELECT TRCK_NUM AS trckNum, DLV_CORP_CD AS dlvCompanyCode FROM DLV_INFO WHERE TRCK_NUM IN( SELECT TRCK_NUM as trckNum FROM DLV_INFO WHERE USR_ID = #{usrId} GROUP BY TRCK_NUM) AND SYS_REG_DTIME > SYSDATE -14
